description: Other Side is a ProtoFlux node that returns the opposite side equivalent of the provided Node (BodyNode) on an anthro body.

fields.Node: The node to flip to the opposite side.
fields.* ([[Type:BodyNode|BodyNode]]): Node (BodyNode) but on the opposite side of an anthro body. This value will be "NONE" if no such conversion exists (Like spine or head).
